2. Next, determine how many packs of pencils each student will get.
3. After that, find out how many erasers can be given to each student.
4. If Mrs. Johnson decides to keep 5 notebooks for herself, how many notebooks will be distributed?
5. Finally, if she wants to give each student one extra pencil for every 2 packs left over, how many pencils will each student receive after distributing the leftover packs?
